summary: Comprehensive testing of QueueIt mobile-optimized admin dashboard PWA completed. All mobile features working correctly: bottom tab navigation (Player, Queue, QR Code, Settings), mobile header with Spotify status, touch-friendly UI. Desktop layout also verified working correctly with original design.

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent preview badge overlaps QR Code and Settings tabs, blocking direct clicks. Tabs work with JavaScript clicks or force=True.
ui_bugs.note: This is an Emergent preview environment issue, not a code bug. In production without the badge, tabs will work normally.

passed_tests: Admin login at /admin with password 'hostel2024' on mobile viewport (393x852) - SUCCESS
Mobile bottom tab bar with 4 tabs (Player, Queue, QR Code, Settings) - SUCCESS
Mobile Player tab shows mini stats (Playing, In Queue, Total) - SUCCESS
Mobile Player tab shows Spotify player component - SUCCESS
Mobile Player tab shows Skip and Clear buttons - SUCCESS
Mobile Queue tab shows queue list or empty state - SUCCESS
Mobile QR Code tab shows QR code generator component - SUCCESS
Mobile QR Code tab shows QR preview, venue input, Download/Print/Copy buttons - SUCCESS
Mobile Settings tab shows Spotify connection section - SUCCESS
Mobile Settings tab shows About section (Version, Customer URL) - SUCCESS
Mobile Settings tab shows Logout button - SUCCESS
Tab switching works correctly between all 4 tabs (via JS click) - SUCCESS
Mobile header shows QueueIt branding - SUCCESS
Mobile header shows Spotify connection status indicator (green/gray dot) - SUCCESS
Mobile header has logout button - SUCCESS
Desktop layout (1920x800) works correctly with original design - SUCCESS
Desktop has ADMIN CONSOLE header with LOGOUT button - SUCCESS
Desktop has 3 stats cards (Now Playing, In Queue, Total Songs) - SUCCESS
Desktop has Spotify player component - SUCCESS
Desktop has Queue management with PLAY NEXT and CLEAR ALL buttons - SUCCESS
Desktop has QR Code Generator - SUCCESS
Desktop logout button works - SUCCESS
Mobile tab bar is hidden on desktop (correct responsive behavior) - SUCCESS
All required data-testid attributes present on interactive elements - SUCCESS
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile PWA admin dashboard fully tested. Two layout modes exist: Desktop (md+) with original full-width design, Mobile (<md) with bottom tab navigation. The activeTab state controls which mobile tab content is shown ('player', 'queue', 'qr', 'settings'). Spotify connection status affects which buttons appear in Settings tab. The Emergent preview badge may overlap bottom tabs in preview environment - use force=True or JS clicks for testing. All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for automated testing.
